parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const siteSlug = ($json.siteSlug || $env.SITE_SLUG || ''); const filters = ['_type==\"article\"', 'siteSlug==\"' + siteSlug + '\"', 'status==\"draft\"', '!defined(coverImage)']; const query = '*[' + filters.join(' && ') + ']|order(_createdAt asc)[0...1]'; return 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent(query); })() }}
